message:
🐛 Remove github-actions[bot] before assigning Copilot (#124)

The greeting workflow assigns github-actions[bot] to new issues, which
blocks Copilot assignment. Unassign it before assigning Copilot.

Also simplify the inner label check — the if: condition already gates
on triage/accepted so the redundant inner check is removed.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
